subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: multilateral (IMF Art IV 2026, EC, TI, RSF, V-Dem, BTI, WHO, NATO) + regional independent press (Balkan Insight, OSW, bne IntelliNews).
A NATO member whose EU accession has been stalled for years by a neighbour's identity/constitution veto, fuelling deep disillusion; the denar runs a de-facto euro peg.

Standout features: a NATO/EU-candidate anchor, sound banks, and an EU-integrated export base, against EU-accession frustration, corruption, severe air pollution, and depopulation. Source-lean: MODERATE Anglophone.

economic.notes: Sound banks and a de-facto euro peg on a small, EU-dependent export base.

fiscal_state.notes: Debt including guarantees ~60% GDP, with the deficit consolidating slowly. (IMF 2026 Art IV)

monetary_independence.notes: A de-facto euro peg - the central bank imports the ECB stance, a stability-for-autonomy trade-off. (IMF; NBRM)

reserve_currency_intl_monetary.notes: The denar is not a reserve currency. (definitional)

inflation.notes: Eased to ~3%, with sticky core/wage pressure. (IMF)

banking_stability.notes: Well-capitalised and profitable, with record-low NPLs, largely foreign-owned. (IMF; NBRM)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Auto-components (most exports EU-bound) plus remittances and free-zone FDI - small, EU-dependent, with concentration risk. (Invest NM; trade.gov)

institutional.notes: Usable statistics, against stagnant corruption and minimal EU-driven reform.

rule_of_law.notes: Stagnant corruption (a low TI standing), a weak judiciary, and minimal recent EU reform. (TI CPI 2025; EC; BTI 2026)

statistical_integrity.notes: The statistics office is usable and EU-aligning, with a long-delayed census. (Eurostat)

press_freedom.notes: A slipping RSF rank, with SLAPPs, disinformation, and political pressure. (RSF 2025)

political_social.notes: Democratic but EU-accession-frustrated, with an ethnic cleavage and depopulation.

political_stability.notes: A democratic government, but years of EU-accession frustration over a neighbour's veto fuel deep disillusion and stalemate. (OSW; EWB)

civil_liberties.notes: Formal freedoms broadly upheld. (V-Dem/Freedom House class)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: A lawful migration regime; emigration-heavy and a transit corridor. (IOM; EC)

social_cohesion.notes: A Macedonian/Albanian cleavage managed via the Ohrid Agreement, with EU-disillusion an added strain. (BTI)

demographics.notes: Down ~9% since 2002, with very low fertility and a quarter of the population abroad. (OSW; IMF SIP 2025)

geopolitical.notes: A pro-Western NATO member and EU candidate in a stable Balkan position.

alliance_reliability.notes: A NATO member (since 2020) and EU candidate with a durable pro-Western consensus. (NATO)

conflict_involvement.notes: No active conflict in a stable Balkan position. (press)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Open and EU-aligning, not sanctioned. (State Dept)

physical_practical.notes: Severe air pollution and seismic exposure, with a weak health system.

climate.notes: Southern-Balkan heat, drought, and wildfire on exposed agriculture, low readiness. (ND-GAIN; EEA)

healthcare.notes: Weak-to-moderate, with heavy medic emigration. (WHO Europe)

crime_safety.notes: Moderate - low violent crime, with organized-crime/trafficking transit. (OC Index)

disaster_insurance.notes: High seismic exposure with low insurance penetration. (World Bank)

summary: A NATO member and EU candidate with sound, well-capitalised banks, a de-facto euro peg delivering stability, and an EU-integrated auto-components export base. Its defining frustration is an EU accession stalled for years by a neighbour's identity/constitution veto, which has fed deep public disillusion and political stalemate, atop stagnant corruption, a managed Macedonian/Albanian ethnic cleavage, the capital's severe winter air pollution, and steep depopulation. Net, a balanced outcome distribution leaning on the pro-Western anchor.
